home.name: Benoit Tremblay
home.heading: Building things that matter.
home.sub: Computer science student driven by curiosity and a love for creating. Discover my background, explore my projects, and feel free to reach out if you'd like to work together.
home.techDesc: Full-stack apps, software, games, and everything in between.
home.aboutDesc: A little about who I am, my background, and the tools I work with.
home.contactDesc: Open to opportunities, collabs, and questions.

web_apps.stack: Laravel · ASP.NET · REST · JSP · TypeScript · Next.js
web_apps.detail: Full-stack apps from idea to deployment. Clean architecture, proper auth, CI/CD pipelines.

apis.stack: Java · Kotlin · React Native · Android · iOS
apis.detail: Native and cross-platform mobile apps. From Android to iOS, built for performance and real device feel.

desktop_apps.stack: JavaScript · Python · Electron · Next.js · Qt · Cross-platform
desktop_apps.detail: Desktop applications built with Electron and Python. Packaged as standalone executables for Windows, macOS and Linux.

game_dev.detail: Games and interactive experiences from prototype to polished release.

bio.p1: I started gymnastics at age <highlight>3</highlight>, drawn to the combination of strength, precision, and artistry the sport demands. Over the years I've competed across six events and learned that the mental discipline required in the gym translates directly to every other area of life.
bio.p2: When I'm not training, I'm building. My interest in <highlight>computer science</highlight> grew from a curiosity about how things work under the hood. I started with small scripts, moved into web development, and now build full-stack applications with real users in mind.
bio.p3: The overlap between both worlds is what drives me — <highlight>iteration, feedback, and mastery</highlight>. Whether it's perfecting a vault or refactoring an API, the process is the same.

projectsBuilt.title: Projects Built
projectsBuilt.body: Full-stack apps, REST APIs, portfolio projects, and experimental tools — all built with modern web technologies and real users in mind.

repos.title: Projects & Repositories
repos.body: public repositories on GitHub — ranging from full-stack web apps to algorithms and personal experiments. Each one is a snapshot of something I was learning or building at the time.

topLang.title: Top Languages
topLang.body: Languages I use most across my public repositories.

skills.heading: Technical skills
skills.legend: Technologies, frameworks and tools I've learned, worked with and use in projects.

projects.pageSubtitle: A selection of things I've built — full-stack apps, games, websites, and experiments.

studentResidence.title: Student Residence
studentResidence.description: A web platform to manage student housing units, tenants, and accounts — with role-based access for admins and residents.

conferenceManager.title: Conference Manager
conferenceManager.description: A workshop and conference scheduling tool with a calendar view, local management, and user authentication.

fileManagers.title: File Managers
fileManagers.description: A client-server file sharing app with comments, user management, and shared file access.

portfolio.title: My Portfolio
portfolio.description: This portfolio — built with Next.js, TypeScript, and CSS Modules. Multi-language support via next-intl, dark and light mode.

olympicWave.title: Olympic Wave
olympicWave.description: A marketing website for a sports coaching service, built with React and deployed on Netlify.

lanRadar.title: Lan Radar
lanRadar.description: Local network scanner with ping monitor, speed test, and app browser — built with Electron.

lolDashboard.title: LoL Client Dashboard
lolDashboard.description: A fan-made desktop app for interacting with the League of Legends client. Auto-accept, auto ban/pick, lobby management, and more.

theLastWait.title: The Last Wait
theLastWait.description: A solo-developed psychological horror game with a deep, narrative-driven story. Built in Unreal Engine with immersive audio design.

magicianBrowser.title: Magician Adventure (Browser)
magicianBrowser.description: A browser-based RPG adventure game built with PHP and JavaScript.

teamManager.title: Team Manager For A Store
teamManager.description: An Android app to manage store employees and departments.

remindersPlanner.title: Reminders Planner
remindersPlanner.description: A cross-platform mobile app to create, edit, and receive notifications for personal reminders.

taskManager.title: Client/Server Task Manager
taskManager.description: A Java client-server app for managing tasks across a network connection.

magicianConsole.title: Magician Adventure (Console)
magicianConsole.description: A turn-based console RPG built in C# with battle mechanics and a game over screen.

vehiculeLocation.title: Vehicule Location
vehiculeLocation.description: A desktop app for managing vehicle rentals, with separate client and employee views.
